title: Refresh the stale managed-hash ledger so a clean checkout stops reporting false drift
action: Re-run self-onboard so .bee/onboarding.json records the current hashes; commit the ledger plus the skill-tree re-sync it produces. Verify: a clean read of `bee status --json` reports drift:false and the version tuple stays 1.9.0.

prohibitions: Do not edit onboarding.json by hand — it is CLI-owned

trace.outcome: Ledger refreshed; clean checkouts no longer report false drift at 1.9.0
trace.verify_output: onboard status=applied; status --json now reports drift:false (was drift:true with drift_detail ['.bee/bin/lib/lock.mjs']); bee_version/plugin_version still 1.9.0; files were byte-identical to source throughout — only the tracked ledger was stale
